title: Tenon Refractory Mortar - High Temperature Mix for Fireplaces, Fire Pits, Chimneys, Parging, Brick, Clay, and More, White in Color, High Heat Resistance, Up to 2550°F (1, 10 Pound)
description:
About this item
READY TO USE: Preblended, just add water and go!
INDOOR OR OUTDOOR: Ideal for fireplaces, inside of fire pit rings, barbeques, pizza ovens, and chimney applications such as setting clay flue liners, parging a smoke chimney chamber
EFFICIENT WORKING TIME: Provides 1 hour of working time prior to hardening
HIGH STRENGTH: Once cured, becomes water insoluble and acid resistant
ASTM CERTIFIED: Passes ASTM C199 (required by most building codes for installation of firebrick and flues in chimneys, masonry fireplaces and similar applications)
reviews_5s:
This is only the second brand of refractory mortar I have used but it was excellent. It was much better and easier to work with than the other brand I tried. I highly recommend this product.You can see in the background the mortar mix. Keep it the right consistency and it works extremely well.
I filled 75% of the fire place floor fire bricks. It filled well and looked good.Very easy to work with compared to other brands. It was super easy to mix up. Only time will tell if it holds up so I’ll update the review if things change but really enjoyed working with this mix. It was on par with going rate and though it wasn’t a deal, considering the quality and quantity it ships in, I consider this a quality item at a good price.Strong bond, fast drying. Well worth the moneyPlay Video
Literally the best mortar you would find for pizza oven. Love this product.This was my second purchase of this product as the larger bucket wasn’t Quite enough to finish the job. Very pleased with it. If I had any complaint, it isn’t with the product, but with my ability to lay firebrick.Easy to use. Great for a DIYer or Trade pro. Works really well.Great product, used for a home made tandoor
reviews_1s: Buying two bucket but getting one bacut of material.
